name: Team Flash
description:
I made this bot for fun, so it might not work perfectly or exactly as intended. It worked well for me, but you’ll need to use chat memory.

I also brought back some characters and changed a few things I personally wanted to see. It might not be to your liking, but you are the Main Character, so you can change anything!

This bot is mainly focused on Team Flash.

Update 1: I improved the bot a little, added missing characters, and included scripts for a better roleplay experience. Honestly, I promised an update a long ago, but I was feeling lazy and a bit demotivated. I finally did it, though!

What is Next?

I am now writing lore book so that each chacher have deeper description about them, i want the ai to stay consistent as long as possible with how chachers are in the show, from their personalities to how they do hero work. As of now ai will just use information they have so the chachers may not be as they are from the show. I am also working on new intros so that you can choose how you want to start in more ways.

I used proxy DeepSeek V0324.
